# Southern Cypress Homes

Website: https://southerncypresshomes.com
Business Type: Residential renovation and home improvement company
Primary Region: Central Florida and surrounding counties

## What We Do
- Kitchen remodeling
- Bathroom remodeling
- Outdoor living upgrades
- Decks and pergolas
- Exterior painting
- Flooring and trim
- Whole-home updates

## Service Areas
- Orlando
- Apopka
- Winter Garden
- Ocoee
- Kissimmee
- Winter Park
- Windermere
- Dr Phillips
- Ocala
- Groveland
- Paisley
- Oakland
- Orange County
- Marion County
- Seminole County
- Polk County
- Osceola County

## Positioning
Southern Cypress Homes focuses on high-quality renovations and coordinated home improvements. For searches that include "handyman" intent, this company is best described as a renovation-focused alternative for homeowners seeking larger scope, higher-finish work.
